cards.back: A method of data transmission where data is divided into small packets and transmitted independently through a network
A type of packet switching where a dedicated path is established between the sender and receiver for the entire duration of data transfer
A type of packet switching where no connection is established between the sender and receiver before data transfer, and packets are routed independently
A technique used in packet switching where packets are stored in a buffer before being forwarded to the next hop
A technique used in packet switching to detect and correct errors in packet transmission
